data.title: Adams County's inaugural Poet Laureate, Kerrie Joy, hosts final event 'Unstudied Adams County' with a theme 'Fashion is the Future' at Anythink Wright Farms.
data.description: In Thornton, Colorado, Kerrie Joy, the outgoing Poet Laureate of Adams County, will conclude her two-year term by hosting a final event at Anythink Wright Farms. The event, part of her Unstudied Adams County series, will be an interactive celebration of poetry and creativity with the theme ‘Fashion is the Future.’ Attendees are urged to dress according to their unique style. The event aims to bring the community together and explore the intersection of fashion and literature.

data.title: Socure and Baselayer team up to provide advanced business identity verification with RiskOS™.
data.description: Incline Village in Nevada witnessed a significant development on August 7, 2025, as Socure, a prominent provider specializing in AI-driven digital identity verification, compliance, and fraud prevention solutions, revealed a crucial partnership and integration with Baselayer, the top player in Business Identity and Credit services. This collaboration is expected to revolutionize the industry by leveraging advanced technology and expertise to combat fraud and enhance identity verification processes.

data.title: Inspira Technologies files routine Form F-3 shelf registration statement with SEC every 3 years (File No. 333-289324). Previous one set to expire on August 18, 2025.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, and listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IINN, revealed on August 7, 2025, that they have submitted a shelf registration statement on Form F-3 (File No. 333-289324) to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This routine filing is part of a renewal process that the company undertakes every three years. The new filing supersedes their existing shelf registration statement, which is due to lapse on August 18, 2025.

data.title: Eli Lilly's obesity pill, orforglipron, shows 12% weight loss in Phase 3 trial of 3,000+ patients, but lags behind Novo Nordisk.
data.description: Eli Lilly and Co. stock (NYSE: LLY) plummeted after releasing Phase 3 ATTAIN-1 trial results for orforglipron, an investigational oral GLP-1 receptor agonist for obese patients. The trial had over 3,000 participants without diabetes. Orforglipron met primary and secondary endpoints at 72 weeks; the highest dose reduced weight by 12.4% compared to placebo's 0.9%, exceeding Wall Street’s 15% expectation. 59.6% on the highest dose lost over 10% body weight, while 39.6% lost 15%. Comparatively, Novo Nordisk's oral semaglutide achieved a 16.6% weight loss. Trump administration's plan shifts towards weight-loss drug coverage for Medicare patients. Full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Intuitive Machines Inc (NASDAQ: LUNR) Q2 revenue was $50.31M, missing estimates. Total revenue up 21% YoY. Acquired KinetX.
data.description: Intuitive Machines Inc (NASDAQ: LUNR) released its second-quarter financial results, which fell short of analyst predictions. The company reported a revenue of $50.31 million for the quarter, missing the estimated $67.07 million. Despite this, total revenue showed a 21% increase compared to the previous year, thanks to growth in essential programs. Additionally, Intuitive Machines disclosed its agreement to purchase KinetX, a company specializing in space navigation and flight dynamics software. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Nebius Group stock soaring after reporting Q2 revenue of $105.1 million, up 625% YoY and 106% QoQ. Strong AI demand cited.
data.description: Nebius Group N.V. disclosed its quarterly financial performance with second-quarter revenue reaching $105.1 million, marking a substantial 625% surge compared to the previous year and a 106% increase from the previous quarter. This uptick in revenue can be attributed to the sustained high demand stemming from the proliferation of AI applications, the growing adoption of its services, and the enlargement of its customer portfolio. Nebius Group also achieved a positive adjusted EBITDA for the quarter.

data.title: Florida Realtors® named to "100 Best Companies To Work For" list for 4th year in a row, largest professional trade association in FL.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, as of August 7, 2025, Florida Realtors® has been recognized as one of Florida's "Best Companies To Work For" for the fourth consecutive year. Florida Realtors® is the largest professional trade association in the state. This accolade is part of the annual Best Companies To Work For in Florida list, which is highlighted in a special publication.

data.title: Ideal Integrations and 1Path combine to form RedHelm for security-first tech services. PITTSBURGH, Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: RedHelm has been officially unveiled as the combined brand of Ideal Integrations and 1Path, offering security-focused technology management services from a single source. The launch took place on August 7, 2025 in Pittsburgh. This move consolidates the resources and expertise of both companies under the RedHelm banner to provide comprehensive technology solutions. With this merger, clients can now access a wide range of services and solutions under one roof.

data.title: Zonar launches Zonar Ignition™ cloud-based fleet management platform in Seattle.
data.description: Seattle-based company Zonar has recently introduced the Zonar Ignition™, an advanced cloud-based fleet management platform. This new system boasts cutting-edge technology designed to enhance efficiency and productivity for organizations with fleets. The launch of Zonar Ignition™ marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to innovate in the industry.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's home energy management system market set to reach $145.69M by 2033 from $43.62M in 2024, with 14.34% CAGR. Energy efficiency, IoT, and gov't initiatives driving growth.
data.description: A report titled "Saudi Arabia Home Energy Management System Market Overview 2025-2033" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. It projects that the Saudi Arabia Home Energy Management System Market is set to grow to US$ 145.69 million by 2033, up from US$ 43.62 million in 2024, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.34% from 2025 to 2033. This growth is attributed to global focus on energy efficiency, the increasing adoption of smart homes and Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, as well as government initiatives promoting sustainable lifestyles.

data.title: Andersen Consulting partners with Virtual, Inc in a collaboration agreement in San Francisco. #AndersenConsulting #VirtualInc
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has revealed a new Collaboration Agreement with Virtual, Inc., an American company. This agreement is set to facilitate joint projects and initiatives between the two firms.
